option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
local nk = require("nakama")
local OPCODE_STATE = 1 local OPCODE_MOVE = 2
local WIN_LINES = { {1,2,3},{4,5,6},{7,8,9}, {1,4,7},{2,5,8},{3,6,9}, {1,5,9},{3,5,7}, }
local function now_ms() return math.floor(nk.time() * 1000) end
local function compute_winner(board) for _, line in ipairs(WIN_LINES) do local a,b,c = line[1], line[2], line[3] local v = board[a] if v ~= "" and v == board[b] and v == board[c] then return v, line end end return nil, nil end
local function is_full(board) for i=0,8 do if board[i] == "" then return false end end return true end
local function other(mark) if mark == "X" then return "O" end return "X" end
local function public_state(state) local players = {} for uid, p in pairs(state.players) do table.insert(players, { userId = uid, username = p.username, mark = p.mark, connected = p.connected }) end
-- UI expects label.open as boolean; match list uses numeric 1/0 for Bleve queries. local open_bool = (state.label and state.label.open == 1) return { board = state.board, players = players, turnUserId = state.turnUserId, status = state.status, winnerUserId = state.winnerUserId, winningLine = state.winningLine, moveCount = state.moveCount, label = { open = open_bool, mode = state.label and state.label.mode or "classic" }, turnDeadlineMs = state.turnDeadlineMs, } end
local function broadcast(dispatcher, state) -- presences=nil, sender=nil => broadcast to whole match (required arity for Lua dispatcher) dispatcher.broadcast_message(OPCODE_STATE, nk.json_encode(public_state(state)), nil, nil) end
local function choose_first_turn(state) -- X starts if present. local x_uid = nil for uid, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == "X" then x_uid = uid break end end state.turnUserId = x_uid if not state.turnUserId then for uid,_ in pairs(state.players) do state.turnUserId = uid break end end if state.label.mode == "timed" then state.turnDeadlineMs = now_ms() + (state.turnTimeSec or 30) * 1000 else state.turnDeadlineMs = nil end end
local function next_turn(state) if not state.turnUserId then return end local current = state.turnUserId local current_mark = state.marksByUserId[current] if not current_mark then return end local next_mark = other(current_mark) local next_uid = nil for uid, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == next_mark then next_uid = uid break end end state.turnUserId = next_uid if state.label.mode == "timed" then state.turnDeadlineMs = now_ms() + (state.turnTimeSec or 30) * 1000 else state.turnDeadlineMs = nil end end
local function assign_mark(state, uid) local used_x = false for _, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == "X" then used_x = true end end state.marksByUserId[uid] = used_x and "O" or "X" end
function match_init(context, params) local mode = "classic" if params and params.mode == "timed" then mode = "timed" end local tts = nil if mode == "timed" then local v = tonumber(params and params.turnTimeSec) or 30 if v < 5 then v = 5 end if v > 120 then v = 120 end tts = math.floor(v) end
local state = { board = { "","","","","","","","","" }, -- 1-indexed: 1-9 maps to cells 0-8 players = {}, marksByUserId = {}, turnUserId = nil, status = "waiting", winnerUserId = nil, winningLine = nil, moveCount = 0, -- open: 1 = accepting joins (indexed for match list queries), 0 = closed label = { open = 1, mode = mode }, turnTimeSec = tts, turnDeadlineMs = nil, }
return state, 5, nk.json_encode(state.label) end
function match_join_attempt(context, dispatcher, tick, state, presence, metadata) local count = 0 for _, _ in pairs(state.players) do count = count + 1 end if count >= 2 and not state.players[presence.user_id] then return state, false, "match full" end if state.status == "finished" and not state.players[presence.user_id] then return state, false, "match finished" end return state, true end
function match_join(context, dispatcher, tick, state, presences) for _, p in ipairs(presences) do local uid = p.user_id if not state.players[uid] then assign_mark(state, uid) end local mark = state.marksByUserId[uid] state.players[uid] = { username = p.username, mark = mark, connected = true } end
local count = 0 for _, _ in pairs(state.players) do count = count + 1 end if count >= 2 and state.status == "waiting" then state.status = "active" state.label.open = 0 choose_first_turn(state) else state.label.open = (count < 2) and 1 or 0 end
dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) broadcast(dispatcher, state) return state end
function match_leave(context, dispatcher, tick, state, presences) for _, p in ipairs(presences) do local uid = p.user_id if state.players[uid] then state.players[uid].connected = false end end
if state.status == "active" then local connected = {} for uid, pl in pairs(state.players) do if pl.connected then table.insert(connected, uid) end end if #connected == 1 then state.status = "finished" state.winnerUserId = connected[1] state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) end end
broadcast(dispatcher, state) return state end
function match_loop(context, dispatcher, tick, state, messages) if state.status == "active" and state.label.mode == "timed" and state.turnDeadlineMs and state.turnUserId then if now_ms() > state.turnDeadlineMs then local loser = state.turnUserId local loser_mark = state.marksByUserId[loser] local winner = nil for uid, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == other(loser_mark) then winner = uid break end end state.status = "finished" state.winnerUserId = winner state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) broadcast(dispatcher, state) end end
for _, msg in ipairs(messages) do if msg.op_code == OPCODE_MOVE and state.status == "active" and state.turnUserId and msg.sender.user_id == state.turnUserId then -- msg.data is binary; convert to string local data_str = type(msg.data) == "string" and msg.data or nk.binary_to_string(msg.data) local index_str = string.match(data_str, '"index":(%d+)') local idx = index_str and tonumber(index_str) if idx and idx >= 0 and idx <= 8 and state.board[idx] == "" then local mark = state.marksByUserId[msg.sender.user_id] if mark then state.board[idx] = mark state.moveCount = state.moveCount + 1
local win_mark, line = compute_winner(state.board) if win_mark then state.status = "finished" state.winningLine = line for uid, m in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if m == win_mark then state.winnerUserId = uid break end end state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) elseif is_full(state.board) then state.status = "finished" state.winnerUserId = nil state.winningLine = nil state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) else next_turn(state) end
broadcast(dispatcher, state) end end end end
return state end
function match_terminate(context, dispatcher, tick, state, grace_seconds) return state end
function match_signal(context, dispatcher, tick, state, data) return state, "" end
-- Match module must return a table with callback functions. return { match_init = match_init, match_join_attempt = match_join_attempt, match_join = match_join, match_leave = match_leave, match_loop = match_loop, match_terminate = match_terminate, match_signal = match_signal, }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
local nk = require("nakama")
local OPCODE_STATE = 1 local OPCODE_MOVE = 2
local WIN_LINES = { {1,2,3},{4,5,6},{7,8,9}, {1,4,7},{2,5,8},{3,6,9}, {1,5,9},{3,5,7}, }
local function now_ms() return math.floor(nk.time() * 1000) end
local function compute_winner(board) for _, line in ipairs(WIN_LINES) do local a,b,c = line[1], line[2], line[3] local v = board[a] if v ~= "" and v == board[b] and v == board[c] then return v, line end end return nil, nil end
local function is_full(board) for i=1,9 do if board[i] == "" then return false end end return true end
local function other(mark) if mark == "X" then return "O" end return "X" end
local function public_state(state) local players = {} for uid, p in pairs(state.players) do table.insert(players, { userId = uid, username = p.username, mark = p.mark, connected = p.connected }) end
-- UI expects label.open as boolean; match list uses numeric 1/0 for Bleve queries. local open_bool = (state.label and state.label.open == 1) return { board = state.board, players = players, turnUserId = state.turnUserId, status = state.status, winnerUserId = state.winnerUserId, winningLine = state.winningLine, moveCount = state.moveCount, label = { open = open_bool, mode = state.label and state.label.mode or "classic" }, turnDeadlineMs = state.turnDeadlineMs, } end
local function broadcast(dispatcher, state) -- presences=nil, sender=nil => broadcast to whole match (required arity for Lua dispatcher) dispatcher.broadcast_message(OPCODE_STATE, nk.json_encode(public_state(state)), nil, nil) end
local function choose_first_turn(state) -- X starts if present. local x_uid = nil for uid, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == "X" then x_uid = uid break end end state.turnUserId = x_uid if not state.turnUserId then for uid,_ in pairs(state.players) do state.turnUserId = uid break end end if state.label.mode == "timed" then state.turnDeadlineMs = now_ms() + (state.turnTimeSec or 30) * 1000 else state.turnDeadlineMs = nil end end
local function next_turn(state) if not state.turnUserId then return end local current = state.turnUserId local current_mark = state.marksByUserId[current] if not current_mark then return end local next_mark = other(current_mark) local next_uid = nil for uid, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == next_mark then next_uid = uid break end end state.turnUserId = next_uid if state.label.mode == "timed" then state.turnDeadlineMs = now_ms() + (state.turnTimeSec or 30) * 1000 else state.turnDeadlineMs = nil end end
local function assign_mark(state, uid) local used_x = false for _, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == "X" then used_x = true end end state.marksByUserId[uid] = used_x and "O" or "X" end
function match_init(context, params) local mode = "classic" if params and params.mode == "timed" then mode = "timed" end local tts = nil if mode == "timed" then local v = tonumber(params and params.turnTimeSec) or 30 if v < 5 then v = 5 end if v > 120 then v = 120 end tts = math.floor(v) end
local state = { board = { "","","","","","","","","" }, -- 1-indexed: 1-9 maps to cells 0-8 players = {}, marksByUserId = {}, turnUserId = nil, status = "waiting", winnerUserId = nil, winningLine = nil, moveCount = 0, -- open: 1 = accepting joins (indexed for match list queries), 0 = closed label = { open = 1, mode = mode }, turnTimeSec = tts, turnDeadlineMs = nil, }
return state, 5, nk.json_encode(state.label) end
function match_join_attempt(context, dispatcher, tick, state, presence, metadata) local count = 0 for _, _ in pairs(state.players) do count = count + 1 end if count >= 2 and not state.players[presence.user_id] then return state, false, "match full" end if state.status == "finished" and not state.players[presence.user_id] then return state, false, "match finished" end return state, true end
function match_join(context, dispatcher, tick, state, presences) for _, p in ipairs(presences) do local uid = p.user_id if not state.players[uid] then assign_mark(state, uid) end local mark = state.marksByUserId[uid] state.players[uid] = { username = p.username, mark = mark, connected = true } end
local count = 0 for _, _ in pairs(state.players) do count = count + 1 end if count >= 2 and state.status == "waiting" then state.status = "active" state.label.open = 0 choose_first_turn(state) else state.label.open = (count < 2) and 1 or 0 end
dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) broadcast(dispatcher, state) return state end
function match_leave(context, dispatcher, tick, state, presences) for _, p in ipairs(presences) do local uid = p.user_id if state.players[uid] then state.players[uid].connected = false end end
if state.status == "active" then local connected = {} for uid, pl in pairs(state.players) do if pl.connected then table.insert(connected, uid) end end if #connected == 1 then state.status = "finished" state.winnerUserId = connected[1] state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) end end
broadcast(dispatcher, state) return state end
function match_loop(context, dispatcher, tick, state, messages) if state.status == "active" and state.label.mode == "timed" and state.turnDeadlineMs and state.turnUserId then if now_ms() > state.turnDeadlineMs then local loser = state.turnUserId local loser_mark = state.marksByUserId[loser] local winner = nil for uid, mark in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if mark == other(loser_mark) then winner = uid break end end state.status = "finished" state.winnerUserId = winner state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) broadcast(dispatcher, state) end end
for _, msg in ipairs(messages) do if msg.op_code == OPCODE_MOVE and state.status == "active" and state.turnUserId and msg.sender.user_id == state.turnUserId then -- msg.data is binary; convert to string local data_str = type(msg.data) == "string" and msg.data or nk.binary_to_string(msg.data) local index_str = string.match(data_str, '"index":(%d+)') local idx = index_str and tonumber(index_str) if idx and idx >= 0 and idx <= 8 and state.board[idx] == "" then local mark = state.marksByUserId[msg.sender.user_id] if mark then state.board[idx] = mark state.moveCount = state.moveCount + 1
local win_mark, line = compute_winner(state.board) if win_mark then state.status = "finished" state.winningLine = line for uid, m in pairs(state.marksByUserId) do if m == win_mark then state.winnerUserId = uid break end end state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) elseif is_full(state.board) then state.status = "finished" state.winnerUserId = nil state.winningLine = nil state.turnUserId = nil state.turnDeadlineMs = nil state.label.open = 0 dispatcher.match_label_update(nk.json_encode(state.label)) else next_turn(state) end
broadcast(dispatcher, state) end end end end
return state end
function match_terminate(context, dispatcher, tick, state, grace_seconds) return state end
function match_signal(context, dispatcher, tick, state, data) return state, "" end
-- Match module must return a table with callback functions. return { match_init = match_init, match_join_attempt = match_join_attempt, match_join = match_join, match_leave = match_leave, match_loop = match_loop, match_terminate = match_terminate, match_signal = match_signal, }

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
